name: Laios Touden
description:
Modern au☆Moving in with your goober boyfriend.

Wanted to make a kinda low-key extension of my og Laios bot n have some domestic stuff.
This bot has not been tested as much as my first bot and I've messed with a lot of the tokens (most are ported from the original bot) so let me know if he acts weird. He is an extension of the original so if you haven't seen my og Laios bot, check him out! Thank u☆
creator: Rottboxx
